name: County Fair Banana Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crusts.
2. For the chocolate layer, melt chocolate chips with butter and corn syrup in a double boiler set over hot, not boiling, water. Stir frequently. Remove from heat, let cool, then stir in vanilla. Divide between pie crusts and spread evenly.
3. Heat milk in a saucepan to scald. Beat egg yolks and gradually add sugar. Gradually stir in flour. Add the hot milk to the yolk mixture. Transfer to a medium-sized saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, over medium-high heat using a wire whisk. The mixture will lump as it begins to thicken. Bring to a boil, then boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and continue to stir until smooth. Beat in butter and vanilla rum.
4. Cool the mixture to room temperature.
5. Peel bananas and slice thinly, tossing with lemon juice.
6. Whip 1 cup of cream until firm but not stiff.
7. Mix a quarter of the cooled cream into the egg mixture to lighten it; fold the remaining cream and bananas into the egg mixture.
8. Fill the pie shells with banana cream and smooth to even.
9. Beat the remaining cream until stiff. Spoon around the edge of the pies and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
